'''Ukchet''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] scout of [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit's]] tribe. He was the first to spot [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]].

*{{Film|IV}} {{1st}}
